scenario: Live deployment to PyPI with all smoke tests passing
expected_behavior: Deploy artifact to PyPI via twine, execute all smoke tests (PASS/FAIL), write deploy.md with Status: DEPLOYED, commit deploy log, proceed to /s7-release-notes
notes: Smoke tests produce binary PASS/FAIL per test

scenario: Staging deployment with smoke test failure
expected_behavior: Deploy to staging, execute smoke tests, detect FAIL in health_check, write deploy.md with Status: FAILED, report specific failure and recommend rollback decision to user
notes: Blocked status - requires user approval for rollback

scenario: Dry-run mode simulation for local validation
expected_behavior: Simulate install/build with [DRY-RUN] prefix in logs, execute smoke tests on locally installed artifact, write deploy.md with deploy_mode: 'dry-run' and Status: DRY-RUN, commit, proceed to /s7-release-notes
notes: No real deployment performed, status is DRY-RUN

scenario: Docker image push to registry missing artifact
expected_behavior: BLOCKED: artifact from /s7-build-artifact is not available. Cannot proceed with deployment.
notes: Hard-gate violation - missing artifact blocks deploy

scenario: GitOps mode: merge to main triggers CD pipeline
expected_behavior: Create PR and merge to main, wait for ArgoCD sync via 'argocd app wait <app> --sync', execute smoke tests on deployed instance, write deploy.md with deploy_mode: 'gitops', Status: DEPLOYED, proceed to /s7-release-notes
notes: GitOps: deployment is merge to main, CD pipeline handles actual deployment
